title: 霞子的日常
description: 爱看书爱旅行也认真工作的霞子把生活里的小情绪都画成表情

notes: The user-provided master/reference image is the source of truth for character identity.
The source image is reference material only and must not be used directly as a WeChat upload asset.
Source/reference intake writes only to source/references and master/input.
Do not generate final sticker sheets or the final 18 independent sticker images until the master character card and master image are approved.

theme.summary: young woman Xiazi's grounded daily life across reading, travel, work, and small everyday emotions

masterCharacter.shortPersonality: warm, energetic, curious, practical, broad-interested, slightly workaholic
lockedTraits: large round dark-brown eyes with bright catchlights
wide open happy smile with pink mouth interior
dark brown to near-black shoulder-length hair
rounded hair silhouette with straight bangs and side strands
cream sleeveless lace or knit top as the base outfit
soft warm anime/chibi rendering with clean simple fills
allowedVariations: facial expression within the same Xiazi identity
small lifestyle props such as book, suitcase, camera, map, laptop, notebook, checklist, coffee cup, calendar, phone, headset, or lightbulb
simple scene cues related to reading, travel, work, rest, or daily greetings
minor outfit additions such as cardigan, scarf, backpack, or travel bag when they do not cover or replace the locked identity traits
caption-specific action marks, sparkles, sweat drop, motion marks, or small hearts when kept inside the safe area
forbiddenVariations: changing Xiazi into an animal, mascot object, robot, or another species
changing age impression away from young woman
changing the hair length, bangs structure, dark hair color identity, face shape, large round eyes, blush style, or warm chibi rendering without approval
removing the approachable everyday personality and turning the pack into a distant fashion portrait set
adding unapproved logos, trademarks, copyrighted IP, or personally sensitive content
using a dark, bitter, or complaint-heavy overtime theme as the main direction
letting image generation invent, rewrite, or misspell production captions
placing final sticker, cover, or icon content on a baked white, checkerboard, or square background

introduction.value: 爱看书爱旅行也认真工作的霞子把生活里的小情绪都画成表情

style.placement: near lower part of each sticker without blocking eyes, mouth, hands, or main expression

items.scenario: general chat greeting, suitable for opening a conversation with friends or colleagues without emphasizing a specific time of day
items.pose: Xiazi waves with a bright smile, holding a small book or phone, with light friendly sparkle

items.scenario: acknowledging a message, task, reminder, or arrangement
items.pose: Xiazi holds a checklist card with a confident nod and a clear checkmark

items.scenario: about to review a document, message, plan, photo, or travel guide before replying
items.pose: Xiazi leans toward an open notebook or laptop, eyes focused, one hand near her chin

items.scenario: responding when someone calls her over, asks for help, or invites her to join
items.pose: Xiazi hurries forward with a small bag, motion marks, and an eager expression

items.scenario: focused work mode, reading materials, writing notes, or dealing with a deadline
items.pose: Xiazi sits at a laptop with notes beside her, eyebrows slightly focused but cute

items.scenario: suddenly getting an idea while working, reading, or planning a trip
items.pose: Xiazi raises one finger with a small lightbulb and sparkle above her head

items.scenario: facing a tricky task, confusing plan, complicated route, or hard book chapter
items.pose: Xiazi looks at scattered papers with a small sweat drop, still trying seriously

items.scenario: finishing a task, booking a trip, solving a problem, or completing a small goal
items.pose: Xiazi jumps happily with a checkmark card and celebratory stars

items.scenario: thanking someone for help, support, reminders, or encouragement
items.pose: Xiazi makes a small bow or heart gesture with a soft grateful smile

items.scenario: encouraging a friend, teammate, or herself before work, study, or travel
items.pose: Xiazi raises both fists with energetic sparkle and a determined smile

items.scenario: quiet reading time, studying, relaxing at home, or staying offline for a bit
items.pose: Xiazi reads an open book with relaxed eyes, small page-turning marks nearby

items.scenario: leaving for a trip, commute, outing, or new plan
items.pose: Xiazi carries a suitcase or backpack, steps forward, and looks excited

items.scenario: taking a travel photo, recording food, scenery, books, or daily moments
items.pose: Xiazi holds a camera or phone, framing a shot with playful focus

items.scenario: taking a short break from work, reading, chatting, or traveling
items.pose: Xiazi stretches with a cup or book nearby, expression relaxed and relieved

items.scenario: asking the other person to wait briefly while Xiazi checks information, packs up, or catches up with the conversation
items.pose: Xiazi raises one hand in a wait gesture while holding a phone or notebook, with a small clock cue

items.scenario: busy at work, on the road, reading, or temporarily unable to respond
items.pose: Xiazi holds a phone with an apologetic smile and small clock cue

items.scenario: reacting to good news, agreeing to a plan, confirming a trip idea, or celebrating a pleasant little moment
items.pose: Xiazi raises both hands happily with bright stars or small hearts, expression excited and cute

items.scenario: ending the workday and switching back to personal life
items.pose: Xiazi waves with a small shoulder bag, warm sunset-like sparkle, relaxed happy face
